tools.name: activateAnomalyDetector.postOperation
tools.description: Activates an anomaly detector.

tools.name: backTestAnomalyDetector.postOperation
tools.description: Runs a backtest for anomaly detection for the specified resource.

tools.name: createAlert.postOperation
tools.description: Creates an alert for an anomaly detector.

tools.name: createAnomalyDetector.postOperation
tools.description: Creates an anomaly detector.

tools.name: createMetricSet.postOperation
tools.description: Creates a dataset.

tools.name: deactivateAnomalyDetector.postOperation
tools.description: Deactivates an anomaly detector.

tools.name: deleteAlert.postOperation
tools.description: Deletes an alert.

tools.name: deleteAnomalyDetector.postOperation
tools.description: Deletes a detector. Deleting an anomaly detector will delete all of its corresponding resources including any configured datasets and alerts.

tools.name: describeAlert.postOperation
tools.description:
Describes an alert.

Amazon Lookout for Metrics API actions are eventually consistent. If you do a read operation on a resource immediately after creating or modifying it, use retries to allow time for the write operation to complete.

tools.name: describeAnomalyDetectionExecutions.postOperation
tools.description: Returns information about the status of the specified anomaly detection jobs.

tools.name: describeAnomalyDetector.postOperation
tools.description:
Describes a detector.

Amazon Lookout for Metrics API actions are eventually consistent. If you do a read operation on a resource immediately after creating or modifying it, use retries to allow time for the write operation to complete.

tools.name: describeMetricSet.postOperation
tools.description:
Describes a dataset.

Amazon Lookout for Metrics API actions are eventually consistent. If you do a read operation on a resource immediately after creating or modifying it, use retries to allow time for the write operation to complete.

tools.name: detectMetricSetConfig.postOperation
tools.description: Detects an Amazon S3 dataset's file format, interval, and offset.

tools.name: getAnomalyGroup.postOperation
tools.description: Returns details about a group of anomalous metrics.

tools.name: getDataQualityMetrics.postOperation
tools.description: Returns details about the requested data quality metrics.

tools.name: getFeedback.postOperation
tools.description: Get feedback for an anomaly group.

tools.name: getSampleData.postOperation
tools.description: Returns a selection of sample records from an Amazon S3 datasource.

tools.name: listAlerts.postOperation
tools.description:
Lists the alerts attached to a detector.

Amazon Lookout for Metrics API actions are eventually consistent. If you do a read operation on a resource immediately after creating or modifying it, use retries to allow time for the write operation to complete.

tools.name: listAnomalyDetectors.postOperation
tools.description:
Lists the detectors in the current AWS Region.

Amazon Lookout for Metrics API actions are eventually consistent. If you do a read operation on a resource immediately after creating or modifying it, use retries to allow time for the write operation to complete.

tools.name: listAnomalyGroupRelatedMetrics.postOperation
tools.description: Returns a list of measures that are potential causes or effects of an anomaly group.

tools.name: listAnomalyGroupSummaries.postOperation
tools.description: Returns a list of anomaly groups.

tools.name: listAnomalyGroupTimeSeries.postOperation
tools.description: Gets a list of anomalous metrics for a measure in an anomaly group.

tools.name: listMetricSets.postOperation
tools.description:
Lists the datasets in the current AWS Region.

Amazon Lookout for Metrics API actions are eventually consistent. If you do a read operation on a resource immediately after creating or modifying it, use retries to allow time for the write operation to complete.

tools.name: putFeedback.postOperation
tools.description: Add feedback for an anomalous metric.

tools.name: tags.listTagsForResource
tools.description: Gets a list of tags for a detector, dataset, or alert.

tools.name: tags.tagResource
tools.description: Adds tags to a detector, dataset, or alert.

tools.name: tags.untagResource
tools.description: Removes tags from a detector, dataset, or alert.

tools.name: updateAlert.postOperation
tools.description: Make changes to an existing alert.

tools.name: updateAnomalyDetector.postOperation
tools.description: Updates a detector. After activation, you can only change a detector's ingestion delay and description.

tools.name: updateMetricSet.postOperation
tools.description: Updates a dataset.

tools.name: openapi.previewSpec
tools.description: Preview an OpenAPI document before adding it as a source

tools.name: openapi.addSource
tools.description: Add an OpenAPI source and register its operations as tools
